title: Squint (disambiguation)
content:
'''Squint''' may refer to:
*A slang term for the [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]]
*A nickname of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Darth Malak|Alek Squinquargeimus]], later known as Darth Malak
*"[[Squint]]," a member of the [[Safecrackers]]

{{Disambig}}
